_comment_adoServerUrl: Default ADO server base URL. Each collection inherits this unless it sets its own serverUrl override.
_comment_collections: Each entry maps a collection/organization name to its PAT. Set serverUrl to override the default for cross-server mirrors (e.g. on-prem ADO Server -> Azure DevOps Services).

GAMS-GIT-Repos.description: Source — on-prem ADO 2022 collection containing Git repos to be mirrored

TargetCollection.description: Target collection for reorganized repos (same server)

MDR-GAMS-ADO.description: Target — Azure DevOps Services organization (cross-server mirror destination). PAT must include Code (Read & Write) and Project and Team (Read, Write & Manage).
